hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(js|ts|json|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "Formatted: $FILE"; fi
FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(test|spec)\.js$'; then echo '{"message": "Test file changed — consider running npm test"}'; fi

INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf\s+/|rm\s+-rf\s+~|:(){ :|:& };:|mkfs|dd\s+if='; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked potentially destructive command"}'; exit 2; fi; exit 0
echo "Session started: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') | Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A') | Node: $(node --version)"
